title: Aliens Untapped
description: A Alien Evolution addon that adds aliens from the show with untapped potential!
body:
**[CurseForge Version >](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aliens-untapped)**

![alien_banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59cee715a2af418d244c5472021889b8ded082ad.png)
# **Content**
This addonpack plans to have aliens that didn't get much use in the show or that had untapped potential!

# **Obtainment**
**Merlinisapien:**
### Method
- Get a seek **Goat Horn**
  
  ![horn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9d74bdcc90f284b46104e6805cac59c077abb37.png)
- Find an **Alien Prison** and use the goat horn

![alien prison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1778de4a7a4e9f94c1134a5706073769e0f27303_0.webp)
  
- Once you feel the presence look around for something watching you and **watch back**

![feel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30382e344a98ab91ef12e06c091a56dec101f3d4.png)
![stalker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c40b655a6c9c6bd4e8aa242a4867ebfcc440ca0e_0.webp)
  
- After looking at them **3** times they'll shed some of their skin that you can scan and craft with

![skin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/580d6680edb3e3102bd8e531f60917e91dee56ed.png)

- Right click the skin to unlock the **Merlinisapien** transformation

![scanned](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d645d7792170e4dd908962793cd2c0df3405061d.png)

**Oryctini:**
### Method 1
- Obtain a **Transformation Code Tablet** for **Oryctini** and right click it to get a code. Input that code into your **Omnitrix** or **Ultimatrix** to add the transformation or to remove it

![CodeTablet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1e796a969a3d430d7437ef00e01ad2ecbca1a8c.png)

### Method 2
- Unlockable via **Mistransformation**

# **Obtaining Transformation Codes**
- There's a chance that the **Machined Soilder** mobs drop a Galvan Transformation Code
- To obtain a code for a **Alien Transformation** besides Galvan in survival you must follow this steps

### **Step 1- Obtaining Primus Link Circuits**
- You must go to the crashed Omnitrix Core ship while possessing an **Omnitrix** or **Ultimatrix** and every 1-2 minutes there's a chance a **Volaticus Biopsis** appears with this chance increasing in alien form. They have a chance to drop a **Primus Link Circuit** when they die among other useful items

![drone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b78953a6946ff3b0b52e01747178181fda68adc1.png)

![link circuit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c785b1f31ef3002f0310bc460268d8b1bdd7d6c.png)

### **Step 2- Obtaining Incomplete Code Tablets**
- There are currently 3 different ways to obtain a **Incomplete Code Tablet** with the first way being through trading with a master level galvanologist

![BuyBroken](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61da7479236ba3a4af30c34ca66835e5e37353ba.png)

- The second way to obtain one is fishing
- The third way to obtain one is through galvan loot chest

### **Step 3- Crafting Transformation Code Tablets**
- After obtaining a **Primus Link Circuit** and **Incomplete Code Tablet**, hold one in each hand while transformed into **Graymatter** then right click
  
![hold_crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9035d6d342fc4f094f1ac7a428982af45ffbe80.png)
![done_crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c33a17f3fffdb54b72c0c5be0e06db5db42450af.png)

# **Upcoming Aliens**

- **Ickthyperambuloid(Walkatrout)**
- **Splixson(Ditto)**

Further information is in the [Discord](https://discord.gg/YUAyktQNkQ)

# **Dependencies**
- [GravityAPI](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gravity-api-forge)(this is already packaged into the addon)
- [Palladium](https://modrinth.com/project/lt2zd42r)
- [KubeJS](https://modrinth.com/project/umyGl7zF)
- [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/project/8BmcQJ2H)
- [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/project/lhGA9TYQ)
- [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/project/t5W7Jfwy)
- [Rhino](https://modrinth.com/project/sk9knFPE)
- [Alien Evolution](https://modrinth.com/project/ZeVD5ZBy)
